# Firebase Studio now supports Gemma 3 image inputs on the Gemini Developer API 🔥🪄🚀

<div class="video-container">
  <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tndZqTcQWK4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>

## Description

Try it out on the Gemini template and switch to the gemma-27b-it model!
https://studio.firebase.google.com/new/gemini

Learn more about Gemma 3:
https://ai.google.dev/gemma/docs/core

Website: https://rodydavis.com
Twitter: @rodydavis
Github: @rodydavis
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/rodydavis
